title: alnus maritima var. metoporina
intro: Alnus maritima var. metoporina, also known as the beach alder, is a subspecies of the alder tree that is native to the coastal regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Alnus maritima var. metoporina include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Alnus maritima var. metoporina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile medicinal plant.
